---
title: "Charles Grant, 1st Lord Glenelg"
---

## Charles Grant, 1st Lord Glenelg

**Dates:** (1788-1866)

### Description

colonial secretary

### Biography

He served as secretary of state for the colonies 1835-1839, notoriously lazy, he was created a peer in 1835.

### Letters

- Letter from Wednesday 5 [December 1838]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
